game_version: Limbus Company (status keywords; conservative summaries — verify-at-ingest)

entries.description: A damage-over-time status: the affected unit loses HP based on its Burn potency each turn, and the count is reduced over time.
A damage-over-time status that triggers when the affected unit acts: it loses HP based on its Bleed potency when it uses a skill, and the count is reduced over time.
A stagger-pressure status that builds up and can be 'burst' by certain skills to lower the target's stagger threshold or deal extra effects.
A status that makes the affected unit take extra damage when it is hit; each triggered hit consumes a Rupture count.
A damage-over-time status: the affected unit loses HP based on its Sinking potency on a recurring trigger, and the count is reduced over time.
A stacking offensive buff that increases the unit's attack/coin power; certain skills consume Poise for additional effects.
A resource that accumulates on certain Identities and is spent by their skills for bonus effects.
A buff that increases a unit's Speed for the turn, letting it act earlier and win more clashes.
